---
title: "Adrim Hamed Outmani"
subtitle: "Pharmacist | Bioinformatician | AI Developer for Precision Medicine"
pagetitle: "Adrim Hamed | Bioinformatics & AI in Pharmacogenomics"
description: "Portfolio of Adrim Hamed Outmani ג€” Pharmacist and bioinformatician specializing in NGS pipelines, deep learning for pharmacogenomics, molecular docking and genomic data analysis with Python and PyTorch."
image: ../media/profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/adrim-hamed-outmani-047491290
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/Aderfi
    - icon: envelope
      text: Contact
      href: mailto:adrimh.outmani@gmail.com
---

```{=html}
<canvas id="dnaCanvas" style="position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; z-index: -1; pointer-events: none;"></canvas>
<script src="../media/dna-helix.js"></script>
```

::: {.column-screen-inset}
::: {.panel-grid}

::: {.glass-panel .p-4 .panel-wide}

## About Me

Pharmacist by training with specialization in **Bioinformatics** and **Machine Learning** applied to the pharmaceutical sector. My profile combines clinical drug knowledge with the technical ability to design genomic analysis pipelines, train predictive models and work with large-scale datasets.

I aim to contribute to **pharmaceutical R&D**, **clinical bioinformatics** or **computational drug development** teams, bringing a cross-disciplinary perspective between biology, chemistry and data science.

:::

::: {.glass-panel .p-4}

## Technical Skills

::: {.skills-grid}

**Programming & Data**
`Python` ֲ· `PyTorch` ֲ· `Pandas` ֲ· `Polars` ֲ· `NumPy` ֲ· `Scikit-learn` ֲ· `C++` ֲ· `Bash` ֲ· `SQL` ֲ· `Git`

**Machine Learning & Deep Learning**
`Neural Networks` ֲ· `DeepFM` ֲ· `Transformers` ֲ· `Multi-Task Learning` ֲ· `Optuna` ֲ· `Cross-Validation` ֲ· `Focal Loss` ֲ· `GNN (in development)`

**Bioinformatics & Genomics**
`BWA-MEM` ֲ· `GATK` ֲ· `Samtools` ֲ· `Picard` ֲ· `Freebayes` ֲ· `VCFtools` ֲ· `Ensembl VEP` ֲ· `FastQC` ֲ· `FastP` ֲ· `NGS Pipelines`

**Computational Pharmacology**
`Pharmacogenomics` ֲ· `PharmGKB` ֲ· `ClinPGx` ֲ· `dbSNP` ֲ· `Molecular Docking` ֲ· `ADMET` ֲ· `Structure-Activity Relationship`

**Infrastructure**
`GNU/Linux (Debian)` ֲ· `WSL` ֲ· `Hyprland/Sway` ֲ· `Quarto` ֲ· `Streamlit` ֲ· `uv`

:::
:::

::: {.glass-panel .p-4}

## Education

* **Master's in Bioinformatics** ג€” Valencia International University *(2025ג€“2026)*
* **Degree in Pharmacy** ג€” University of Granada ג€” *Focus on Pharmacogenomics*
* **Python for Data Science** ג€” Universitat Oberta de Catalunya *(300h)*
* **ML & Big Data for Bioinformatics** ג€” University of Granada *(100h)*
* **Nanomedicines** ג€” Pharmacy Academy Santa Marֳ­a de Espaֳ±a

---

### Languages

* **Spanish** ג€” Native
* **Tamazight** ג€” Native
* **English** ג€” B2 (Professional proficiency)

:::

::: {.glass-panel .p-4 .panel-wide}

## Featured Projects

### Pharmagen ג€” AI for Pharmacogenomic Prediction

End-to-end platform integrating a complete bioinformatics pipeline (FASTQ ג†’ VCF ג†’ Annotation) with a **hybrid Deep Learning model (DeepFM + Transformer)** to predict a patient's phenotypic response to specific drugs.

| Clinical Task | Result |
| :--- | :--- |
| Phenotypic Classification | **86.89%** Precision |
| Dosage Adjustment | **0.8328** Balanced Accuracy |
| Pharmacokinetics | **0.8037** Balanced Accuracy |

**Stack:** Python ֲ· PyTorch ֲ· Optuna ֲ· BWA ֲ· Freebayes ֲ· VCFtools ֲ· Ensembl VEP ֲ· Streamlit

[**View Full Project ג†’**](projects/pharmagen.qmd){.btn .btn-primary role="button" id="explore-button"}

---

### Other Repositories

* **Pgen_dev** ג€” Active development repository for Pharmagen. Architecture and dataset experimentation.
* **dotfiles_Aderfi** ג€” Hyprland/Sway environment configuration for Debian and WSL. Reflects Linux administration proficiency.

:::

::: {.glass-panel .p-4 .panel-wide}

## Blog

Posts on engineering decisions, deep learning architecture analysis and reflections on applied bioinformatics.

[**Read Posts ג†’**](blog/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary role="button" id="explore-button"}

:::

:::
:::
